---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect, regression, or unexpected behavior in Lumen
title: "bug: <short description>"
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the bug. -->

## Severity

- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** — Data loss, security vulnerability, or complete outage
- [ ] 🟠 **High** — Core feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 **Medium** — Feature degraded, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 **Low** — Cosmetic, minor inconvenience, edge case

## Steps to Reproduce

<!-- Numbered list. Be specific. A stranger should be able to reproduce this. -->

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What should happen? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happens? Include error messages verbatim. -->

## Reproduction Rate

- [ ] Always (100%)
- [ ] Often (> 50%)
- [ ] Sometimes (< 50%)
- [ ] Once (cannot reproduce)

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- Drag images or videos here. -->

## Environment

| Field                | Value                                 |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Lumen version        | <!-- e.g. v0.5.0 or commit hash -->    |
| Platform             | <!-- Web / Desktop (macOS/Win/Linux) --> |
| Browser / OS         | <!-- e.g. Chrome 131, macOS 15.2 -->   |
| Screen / Viewport    | <!-- e.g. 1920x1080, 390x844 -->       |
| Account tier         | <!-- Free / Pro / Studio -->           |
| Logged in            | <!-- Yes / No -->                      |

## Console / Network Logs

<!-- Paste relevant browser console errors, network request failures, or server logs.

\`\`\`

\`\`\`

## Suspected Cause

<!-- If you have a hypothesis about the root cause, share it.
     Otherwise leave blank. -->

## Workaround

<!-- Is there a temporary way to avoid the bug? -->

## Regression

- [ ] This used to work in a previous version (if yes, which one: __________)
- [ ] This has never worked
- [ ] Unsure

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues, PRs, or discussions. -->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have tried reproducing on the latest version
- [ ] I have included all environment details above
- [ ] I have redacted any sensitive data from logs
